svg.title: Average retention by learning method (Learning Pyramid estimate)
svg.desc: Average retention by learning method (Learning Pyramid estimate). Source: National Training Laboratories Learning Pyramid (commonly cited, contested). Retention figures are pedagogical estimates, not experimental measurements; used here as a heuristic.

g.text: Average retention by learning method (Learning Pyramid estimate)

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: National Training Laboratories Learning Pyramid (commonly cited, contested) — Retention figures are pedagogical estimates, not experimental measurements; used here as a heuristic.
